task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying a Business Continuity Plan document. The window title or file path should indicate 'bcp_plan.docx'.

task_completion.description: Set the document Title and Subject properties
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Document Properties dialog is open. The 'Title' field contains 'Continuity of Operations Plan – Meridian Financial Group' and the 'Subject' field contains 'Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery'.

task_completion.description: Set the document Author and Keywords properties
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Document Properties dialog is open. The 'Keywords' field contains 'BCP, COOP, disaster recovery, FEMA'. The 'Author' (or a custom property for Author) is set to 'Diana Kowalski'.
The word 'DRAFT' is visible as a background watermark across the pages of the document, or the Watermark dialog is open with 'DRAFT' entered as the text.

task_completion.description: Add the specified footer to all pages
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom margin of the document pages displays the footer text: 'CONFIDENTIAL – FOR INTERNAL REVIEW ONLY – Meridian Financial Group', or the footer editing area is active with this text.

task_completion.description: Save the document as a new file without overwriting the original
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog is open with the file name 'bcp_plan_draft.docx' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory, or the main window title updates to 'bcp_plan_draft.docx'.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI application like LibreOffice Writer, not terminal commands or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used proper word processing features for watermarks and footers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The watermark and footer are added using the application's specific tools (e.g., Format > Watermark, Insert > Header and Footer), rather than just typing the text into the main body of the document.

integrity.description: The agent did not overwrite the original file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses 'Save As' to create a new file rather than just clicking 'Save' on the original 'bcp_plan.docx'.
